'''dhatawa''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crabcake|crabcake]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crabcake|crabcake]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhatawa
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhætæwæth|dhætæwæth]] || [[word:dhætæwæj|dhætæwæj]] || [[word:dhætæwæsh|dhætæwæsh]] || [[word:dhætæwæ|dhætæwæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatatawath|dhatatawath]] || [[word:dhatatawaj|dhatatawaj]] || [[word:dhatatawash|dhatatawash]] || [[word:dhatatawa|dhatatawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatawath|dhatawath]] || [[word:dhatawaj|dhatawaj]] || [[word:dhatawash|dhatawash]] || [[word:dhatawa|dhatawa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatafwath|dhatafwath]] || [[word:dhatafwaj|dhatafwaj]] || [[word:dhatafwash|dhatafwash]] || [[word:dhatafwaf|dhatafwaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhatawatha|dhatawatha]] || [[word:dhatawaja|dhatawaja]] || [[word:dhatawasha|dhatawasha]] || [[word:dhatawaka|dhatawaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhatawath|dhatawath]] || [[word:dhatawaj|dhatawaj]] || [[word:dhatawash|dhatawash]] || [[word:dhatawa|dhatawa]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhatawathal|dhatawathal]] || [[word:dhatawajal|dhatawajal]] || [[word:dhatawashal|dhatawashal]] || [[word:dhatawakal|dhatawakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhatawathatha|dhatawathatha]] || [[word:dhatawajaja|dhatawajaja]] || [[word:dhatawashasha|dhatawashasha]] || [[word:dhatawaka|dhatawaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhatawathan|dhatawathan]] || [[word:dhatawajan|dhatawajan]] || [[word:dhatawashan|dhatawashan]] || [[word:dhatawakan|dhatawakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhatawathaoro|dhatawathaoro]] || [[word:dhatawajaoro|dhatawajaoro]] || [[word:dhatawashaoro|dhatawashaoro]] || [[word:dhatawakaoro|dhatawakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
